#AIAREALL

GENAI SUMMIT

Silicon Valley 2024

83 Days 8 Hours 40 Minutes 56 Seconds

Santa Clara Convention Center | Santa Clara, CA | Nov 1 - Nov 3

Add to Calendar
Add to Calendar
Build the Future

Join us in exploring the future possibilities at the Generative AI Summit Silicon Valley 2024. This third large-scale generative AI conference in Silicon Valley will be held from November 1 to November 3, 2024, at the Mission City Ballroom of the Santa Clara Convention Center. The event is hosted by GPT DAO, a community spontaneously formed by developers, entrepreneurs, and enthusiasts passionate about generative AI.

We are at the forefront of a new technological wave, with generative AI revealing a future of infinite possibilities. With over 5000 attendees, 300 startups, and more than 1000 developers, the summit brings together the world's most cutting-edge entrepreneurial teams and investment institutions to jointly explore the future of this field.

Sponsors
CHECK WHO MAKES THIS EVENT POSSIBLE!
Gold
IOBC Capital
 
IOBC is a venture capital firm specializing in investments across the technology and biotechnology sectors. With a focus on early to growth-stage companies, IOBC provides strategic support and funding to innovative startups. The firm is dedicated to fostering breakthroughs in cutting-edge fields, leveraging its expertise and network to drive success and growth for its portfolio companies.
Official Website
About IOBC Capital
Speakers
LISTEN TO THE EVENT SPEAKERS
Arvind Jain
Founder & CEO
@Glean
Founded by Arvind Jain, Glean is revolutionizing internal information retrieval and management with its AI-powered work assistant software, aimed at enhancing employee efficiency. The company has raised $200 million in its Series C funding round and another $200 million in its Series D, reaching a valuation of $2.2 billion. Competing against traditional solution providers like Hammerspace, Glean is committed to radically transforming data retrieval and management in enterprises.
All Sessions by Arvind Jain

Arvind Jain

Founder & CEO

@Glean

Jim Fan
Research Manager & Lead of Embodied AI
@NVIDIA
Dr. Jim Fan is a Senior Research Scientist at NVIDIA and leads the AI Agents Initiative, focusing on developing versatile agents for both real and simulated environments. His expertise spans multimodal foundation models, reinforcement learning, and computer vision. With a Ph.D. from Stanford Vision Lab under Prof. Fei-Fei Li, Jim has interned at OpenAI, Baidu AI Labs, and MILA, contributing to AI research alongside leaders like Ilya Sutskever and Yoshua Bengio. As a Columbia University Valedictorian, he was awarded the Illig Medal in 2016.
All Sessions by Jim Fan

Jim Fan

Research Manager & Lead of Embodied AI

@NVIDIA

Jon Shalowitz
Managing Director
@Woodside Capital Partners
Jon advises AI and Cloud Infrastructure & Software companies on M&A and strategic financing. With over 25 years of Silicon Valley experience, he's successfully led exits for startups like LiftIgniter, Badgeville, CloudUp Networks, and XDN. Prior to WCP, he held CEO roles and worked at Internet infrastructure giants like 3Com and NetScreen/Juniper. A Phi Beta Kappa graduate of Duke University and Stanford Graduate School of Business alum.
All Sessions by Jon Shalowitz

Jon Shalowitz

Managing Director

@Woodside Capital Partners

Yiran Chen
Professor
@Duke University
Dr. Yiran Chen is the John Cocke Distinguished Professor of Electrical and Computer Engineering at Duke University. He directs the NSF AI Institute for Edge Computing Leveraging Next-generation Networks (Athena) and the NSF Industry-University Cooperative Research Center (IUCRC) for Alternative Sustainable and Intelligent Computing (ASIC). Dr. Chen's research focuses on memory systems, machine learning, and mobile computing. He has published over 600 technical papers, holds 96 US patents, and has received numerous awards for his contributions. A Fellow of AAAS, ACM, IEEE, and NAI, Dr. Chen is a leading voice in responsible AI use and academic equality.
All Sessions by Yiran Chen

Yiran Chen

Professor

@Duke University

Fan Zhang
Co-Founder
@Sequoia Capital China
Fan Zhang is a renowned venture capitalist and co-founder of Sequoia Capital China, one of the most influential VC firms in the country. He has over 25 years of experience investing in innovative companies across various sectors, including internet, semiconductor, blockchain, AI, and spatial computing. Zhang played a pivotal role in establishing Sequoia Capital China in 2005 and helped raise billions for its funds, backing numerous successful startups that went public.
All Sessions by Fan Zhang

Fan Zhang

Co-Founder

@Sequoia Capital China

Exhibitiors
MEET OUR EXHIBITIORS
1Gen AI

 

Meet 1Gen, the Anime AI marketing and sales tools for community.
1Gen bot is a #GENAI assistant in the vein of AI Copilot, a next-level bot assistant. 1Gen can take on and finish an entire sale project on its own. To put it to work, you give it a job—“Acquire traffic that maps all the potential buyers in a telegram group,”—and the AI performs an intention based engagement (conversation, meme, and photos) to find the targets, gets their attention and contact information, then builds and finishes a transaction or an engagement. 1Gen builds all above on top of its in-house multimodal LLM for entertaining and gaming industries.

 

Follow our twitter for more.

Official Website
About 1Gen AI
FinalizeAI

 

Diverse AI Products: Explore a wide range of AI tools designed for various industries, including office, audio, video, pictures, games, and more. Our solutions are tailored to enhance your projects and drive success.

Official Website
About FinalizeAI
IOBC Capital
 
IOBC is a venture capital firm specializing in investments across the technology and biotechnology sectors. With a focus on early to growth-stage companies, IOBC provides strategic support and funding to innovative startups. The firm is dedicated to fostering breakthroughs in cutting-edge fields, leveraging its expertise and network to drive success and growth for its portfolio companies.
Official Website
About IOBC Capital
MountainLion AI

Mlion.ai stands at the forefront of the Web3 industry, offering unparalleled expertise and insights into the dynamic world of blockchain and cryptocurrency. As a powerful AIGC (Artificial Intelligence-Generated Content) application, Mlion.ai has meticulously gathered years of data across various dimensions, including industry news, coin price trends, and asset flows. This vast reservoir of knowledge empowers Mlion.ai to provide users with real-time updates and a deep understanding of the ever-evolving market landscape.

 

Follower our Twitter here!

Official Website
About MountainLion AI
Puffer Finance

 

Puffer is a decentralized native liquid restaking protocol (nLRP) built on Eigenlayer.

It makes native restaking on Eigenlayer more accessible, allowing anyone to run an Ethereum Proof of Stake (PoS) validator while supercharging their rewards.

 

Follow our Twitter here! 

Official Website
About Puffer Finance
Revia

 

Revia can represent you in phone calls (like tedious calls to customer support). Just give it an objective and some basic information — and it can handle your calls on autopilot.

 

Follow our twitter here! 

Official Website
About Revia
StarloomAI

 

Many people are interested in metaphysics, feng shui, and fortune-telling. However, there are many imposters among the true masters. For entrepreneurs and the wealthy, a single reading from a genuine master can be worth a fortune.

 

Try Starloom, where top masters offer free fortune-telling! Our AI metaphysics master, trained with nearly ten thousand enlightened data points and guided by a team of professional feng shui masters, combines the wisdom of 5-10 top experts. Experience top-tier fortune-telling guidance without leaving your home.

 

Try Starloom for free now!

Official Website
About StarloomAI
